name: Garnishes for Drinks
recipeIngredient: Shredded coconut (inside or chunks of fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place mint leaves on the rim of the drink.
2. Add lemon or lime slices to the glass.
3. Slice orange segments and place them on top of the drink.
4. Arrange maraschino cherries on toothpicks and add to the drink.
5. Top with whipped cream, candy canes, pineapple chunks (on toothpicks with cherries), strawberries (on toothpicks), chocolate shavings or curls, and shredded coconut inside or as fruit chunks.
6. For extra flavor, dip some maraschino cherries in lemon juice and freeze them before adding to the drink.
